lyrics.text: 머지않아 나도 보여줘야겠어
lyrics.pinyin: Meojianha nado boyeojwoyagesseo
lyrics.trans: It won't be long, I gotta show you too

lyrics.text: 어딜 가나 내가 들릴 거야, 계속
lyrics.pinyin: Eodil gana naega deullil geoya, gyesok
lyrics.trans: Wherever you go, you'll hear me, continuously

lyrics.text: 멀지 않아, 벽돌 같은 paper를 쌓아 (쌓아), 쌓아 (쌓아), 쌓아
lyrics.pinyin: Meolji anha, byeokdol gateun paper-reul ssaha (ssaha), ssaha (ssaha), ssaha
lyrics.trans: It's not far away, stacking paper like bricks (stack it), stack it (stack it), stack it

lyrics.text: 난 쓸어 담을 거야, 싹 (싹), 싹 (싹), 싹
lyrics.pinyin: Nan sseureo dameul geoya, ssak (ssak), ssak (ssak), ssak
lyrics.trans: I'm gonna sweep it all up, clean (clean), clean (clean), clean

lyrics.text: 채워버릴 거야, 꽉 (꽉), 꽉, 꽉
lyrics.pinyin: Chaewobeoril geoya, kkwak (kkwak), kkwak, kkwak
lyrics.trans: I'm gonna fill it all up, tight (tight), tight, tight

lyrics.text: All the haters gonna stop, stop
lyrics.pinyin: All the haters gonna stop, stop
lyrics.trans: All the haters gonna stop, stop

lyrics.trans: Until their necks break

lyrics.trans: Yeah, I'mma stack it like a layer

lyrics.pinyin: Kkwak chaewo nagayaji, insaengeul matchwo, for the bag
lyrics.trans: Gotta fill it up tight, putting my life on the line, for the bag
